title: Network-Based Bioinformatics Reveal Microenvironment-Driven Cell-to-Cell Communication in the Progression of Multiple Myeloma.
snippet: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNAseq) captures unique profiles of individual cells and uncovers cell-to-cell communication (CCC) through ligand-receptor (LR) interactions. Moreover, it reveals signalling mechanisms underlying cellular heterogeneity and complexity in downstream responses in healthy and disease states. In this work, we developed a composite c...
